handled.resolution: Item 10 now groups as the [OUTLET] component (derived from its outlet flange scope), no longer a text-named line.

The two Outlet lines (10 punched, 15 unpunched) now merge into ONE [OUTLET] component; the flange_type disagreement is flagged as CONFLICTING flange_type. General rule now in place: same-component lines in an order merge into one, and conflicting single-valued attributes are flagged.
[DOOR LOCATION] now an attribute: Access Door lines get component=ACCESS DOOR with door_location=<clock> (e.g. 9:00) lifted from the 'Door Location: @9:00' detail.
[HANDLE LOCATION] now an attribute on IVC lines: handle_location (clock or direction) + handle_location_standard (YES/NO from 'Non-standard').
Item 13 now component=SHRINK WRAP with shrink_wrap_range='21" to 36-1/2"'.
Item 16 now component=SHIP WITH with referenced_po=23971.
Item 18 (Run Test) now merges into the ONE [MECHANICAL RUN TEST] component with item 9 (synonym canonicalized); their status difference STANDARD|REQUIRED is flagged.
Confirmed — that IVC info is captured (handle location now an explicit attribute).
Item 11 -> component=PERCENT WIDTH with pct_width_customer=85% AND pct_width_rounded=85% (rounds to nearest 5%; e.g. 83->85, 82->80 — same rounded value = same construction).
